name: Green Day
bio: Green Day still earn through one of the strongest modern punk and alternative catalogs, with songs that remain large across streaming, sync, and generational rediscovery.
notable_for: Punk-pop songs with major long-tail replay and cross-era familiarity.
career_highlight: Basket Case and Boulevard of Broken Dreams continue to anchor the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Alternative and pop-punk playlists sustain recurring listening.
Cross-era hit density supports constant catalog discovery.
Sync use and youth-culture nostalgia reinforce long-tail value.
